title: SimulationReport
description: Schema for the output of `aasm policy simulate`. Contains aggregate statistics and per-event outcomes from a dry-run policy evaluation.

total_events.description: Total number of events evaluated during the simulation.

denied.description: Number of events that would have been denied by the policy.

allowed.description: Number of events that would have been allowed by the policy.

approval_required.description: Number of events that would have required human approval.

budget_impact_usd.description: Estimated budget impact in USD, if a budget policy section is present. Null when no budget policy is configured.

flagged_outcomes.description: Per-event outcomes for events that were not simply allowed (denied or approval-required).

EventOutcome.description: The outcome of evaluating a single event against a policy in dry-run mode.

event_index.description: Zero-based index of the event in the input sequence.

action.description: Human-readable description of the action that was evaluated.

decision.description: The policy decision for this event.

reason.description: Explanation of why this decision was reached.
